testcases.input: land = [[1,0,0],[0,1,1],[0,1,1]] Output: [[0,0,0,0],[1,1,2,2]] Explanation: The first group has a top left corner at land[0][0] and a bottom right corner at land[0][0]. The second group has a top left corner at land[1][1] and a bottom right corner at land[2][2].
testcases.expectedOutput: [[0,0,0,0],[1,1,2,2]] Explanation: The first group has a top left corner at land[0][0] and a bottom right corner at land[0][0]. The second group has a top left corner at land[1][1] and a bottom right corner at land[2][2].
